title: looshy
description: a different take on default... and maybe a few cats here and there
body:
![a cartoony logo that says "looshy"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d346fd3ba32188fa40dbf7d801e2b22ddc9c1a9b.png)
___
### the classic look of minecraft, but smoother...

_note: this pack is currently a work in progress but i have decided to release an initial version and update it as i go. updates will be frequent but inconsistent._
___
### pack updates

please follow this pack on modrinth or join my [discord server](https://discord.gg/FkqYUUu) for updates. if you have any suggestions,  send me a message on twitter or post it in my discord server! thanks :)
___
### terms of use

this pack is intended for personal use only (private edits are allowed). **please do not redistribute it publicly or make public edits of this pack.**

___
### support me

check out [my cat-themed lunar cloaks](https://www.lunarclient.com/looshy) to support me! 

___
### overlays
[dark mode overlay](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/looshy-dark-mode) - dark version of guis to be easier on the eyes
  
![dark mode pack icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b3e2292f0edb79722f0806c5f169c39e6528f14_0.webp) 

[pink overlay](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/looshy-pink-mode) - everything is now pink

![pink mode logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b27530d83a7f469955968cb1189a529972bb958_0.webp)

[winter mode overlay](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/looshy-winter-mode) - a frosty and wintery look!

![winter mode logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7368a8feaacaf63cfd504622a1a2db83d15db76c.png)
